records.ety: [F. diversifier, LL. diversificare, fr. L. diversus diverse + ficare (in comp.), akin to facere to make. See Diverse.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Diversified (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Diversifying.]

defs: To make diverse or various in form or quality; to give variety to; to variegate; to distinguish by numerous differences or aspects.
quotes: Separated and diversified on from another.
Its seven colors, that diversify all the face of nature.
